audit_items.proof_trace: The callback-after-transfer-before-payment order (L444→L449→L453) is the intentional flash-swap design pattern. Re-entry into bid() is blocked by s_entered (L415-418); re-entry into isValidSignature() is also blocked by the same flag (GPV2CompatibleAuction L125-127). EVM atomicity guarantees that if safeTransferFrom at L453 fails, the entire transaction reverts including the initial safeTransfer, making asset theft without payment impossible.
